notes: Generic spall liner — minimum structural resistance. RHAe ~0.08-0.12 per mm. Represents basic fabric or rubber spall containment layer in vehicles. Primarily catches armor fragments after penetration, not designed for direct ballistic impact.

source.reference: Generic spall liner design, general fragment protection data
source.methodology: RHAe estimated as minimum representative value for non-structural fabric/rubber spall containment layers. Density approximate for mixed fabric materials.
